title: SignalLoop Response (Simplified)
description: Fallback schema if Gemini cannot handle the full nested version. Use this if the full schema causes validation failures.

clinician_brief.description: Clinical summary: what changed, why it matters, trend, uncertainties

patient_explanation.description: Plain-language patient explanation (requires clinician approval before showing)

medsafe_verdict.description: Safety verdict: clean, warn, warn_override_required, block, or not_triggered

referral_indicated.description: Whether a specialist referral is recommended

referral_details.description: Referral reasoning, packet status, missing context

recommended_actions.description: Comma-separated list of recommended next actions

fhir_writes_this_turn.description: Resources written to FHIR this turn (type and ID)
